# Waseem Nasir

> Personal site of Waseem Nasir — founder of SkynetLabs (skynetjoe.com), an AI automation studio. He builds n8n automations, AI agents, WordPress/Next.js sites, and video systems for service businesses, working from Bali (GMT+8) and Lahore.

Waseem Nasir is the person; SkynetLabs is the company. For services, pricing, case studies, free tools, and bookings, the canonical business site is https://skynetjoe.com.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.waseemnasir.com/): Who Waseem is, live client proof board, stack, gallery, and how to work with him.
- [Blog](https://www.waseemnasir.com/blog): Field notes on running an automation agency with Claude Code from Bali.
- [Mentorship](https://www.waseemnasir.com/mentorship): Private 1:1 Claude Code mentorship — learn to build and ship real software by vibe-coding, no CS degree needed.

## Business

- [SkynetLabs](https://skynetjoe.com): Services, pricing, 26 free tools, case studies.
- [Book a call](https://skynetjoe.com/discovery-call): Free discovery call.

## Notes

This llms.txt follows the llmstxt.org draft specification. Last updated 2026-07-13. Maintained by Waseem Nasir.
